message:
test(conformance): add backtrace, startup, tls_keys, sysv_ipc harnesses

Add conformance test harnesses for four fixture families:
- backtrace_ops: backtrace, backtrace_symbols, backtrace_symbols_fd (9 tests)
- startup_ops: __frankenlibc_startup_phase0, __frankenlibc_startup_snapshot (11 tests)
- pthread_tls_keys: pthread_key_create/delete, pthread_getspecific/setspecific (12 tests)
- sysv_ipc_ops: semget/semop/semctl, shmget/shmat/shmdt, msgget (10 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
